headline: Housekeeping Supervisor at Grand Sierra Hotel | Owner at Momentos by Chris | Event Planning Las Vegas
summary:
Housekeeping Supervisor at Grand Sierra Hotel — responsible for floors 12-18 and a team of 14. I run the rooms tight and the schedule tighter.

On the side I own Momentos by Chris, an event planning business focused on Quinceañeras and milestone celebrations in the Las Vegas area. Every family gets treated like they're the only one on the calendar.

If you need someone who knows how to keep 80 rooms spotless before noon and then coordinate a 200-person banquet by seven — that's the skill set.
